title: Rythmos® Anchor
subtitle: Type F
heroDescription: The Rythmos® Anchor Type F is a USB-C powered ambient sensing mesh network node designed for healthcare and senior living environments. It contributes real-time resident location data and passes through alert information while simultaneously collecting environmental data — including temperature, humidity, barometric pressure, ambient light, and sound level — all through a single compact, wallmounted unit that integrates directly into the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure

specs.label: Mesh Network Protocol:
specs.value: Rythmos® Mesh Network · Wirepas 2.4 GHz based

specs.label: Installation:
specs.value: Fixed position — must not be relocated

networkFeatures: Forms a self-healing wireless mesh network throughout the community
Over-the-air firmware updates — no on-site servicing required for software
Passes through nurse alert, fall, and wander event data in real time
Works in concert with Rythmos® Gateway to aggregate and transmit data
Feeds centralized Rythmos® Care Manager web portal and mobile app
Supports tiered event routing to appropriate care staff by zone
Collects data wirelessly from Rythmos® wearables in range
deploymentTip: Install anchors throughout corridors, common areas, and near exits. Anchor density directly affects location accuracy — Intrex recommends placement every 30 ft in typical senior living corridors. Install at least 1 anchor in every room, and multiple in high-occupancy areas such as dining rooms. Anchors must remain fixed post-calibration; repositioning requires recalibration via the Rythmos® Care Manager portal.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
-Install in fixed location
-Do not relocate after calibration

installation.title: Coverage Density
installation.content:
-Corridors: 30–50 ft spacing
-Increase density in shared areas

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
-Screw mount (recommended)
-Adhesive mount (surface-sensitive)

installation.title: Mounting Surfaces
installation.content:
-Wall, Ceiling
-Pillar

installation.title: Power Routing
installation.content:
-USB-C cable required
-Nearest power source needed

installation.title: Bracket Installation
installation.content:
-Use detachable bracket
-Ensure secure attachment

deploymentTip: Install anchors throughout corridors, common areas, and near exits to ensure full mesh coverage. Anchor density directly affects location accuracy — Intrex recommends placement every 30 ft in typical senior living corridors. Install at least 1 anchor in every room, and multiple anchors in rooms where many people congregate, such as dining rooms. Anchors must remain fixed post-calibration; repositioning requires recalibration via the Rythmos® Care Manager portal.

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: High Accuracy Radar Sensor
ref: Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026 · USB-C Powered Configuration
heroDescription: Rythmos® High Accuracy Radar Sensor is a wireless sensor for in-apartment fall detection to deliver high accuracy real-time alerts via Care Manager.

capabilities.name: Fall Detection
capabilities.desc: Accuracy for standing, sitting, and lying

capabilities.name: Rest Quality
capabilities.desc: Monitoring of stillness and sleep quality

networkFeatures: Fall Detection Accuracy: Near-100% accuracy for standing, sitting, lying, and sudden drops
Machine Learning: Algorithms continuously improve detection over time
False Alarm Reduction: 98.3% reduction versus traditional PIR or camera-based systems
Field of View: 120° horizontal field of view with 60° elevation angle
Micro-movement Monitoring: Accuracy down to 0.2 mm for breathing rate, stillness, and rest quality
Coverage Area: Up to 6 m x 6 m per unit, suitable for standard senior living apartments
deploymentTip: Mount the Radar Sensor in a corner of the room, near the ceiling, for optimal 6 m x 6 m coverage across the space. Corner mounting maximizes the 120° FOV to cover the full room from a single unit. The 60° elevation angle ensures complete floor-level detection for fall events. For rooms larger than 6 m x 6 m, use multiple sensors with overlapping coverage zones. The sensor is privacy-safe—no camera, no images, no video at any time.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content: - Corner mount at ceiling height for full 6 m x 6 m coverage.

installation.title: Coverage Density
installation.content: - Standard senior apartments typically require a single unit

installation.title: Power Routing
installation.content: - Powered via Micro USB 5V DC; nearest power source required

installation.title: Privacy & Compliance
installation.content: - Fully privacy-safe for residents; OTA updates managed via the portal

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Kallos Wearable
heroDescription: Rythmos® Kallos Wearable is a smartwatch-style resident wearable delivers real-time indoor location tracking, automatic fall monitoring, integrated nurse call, 2-way audio communication, and wander management.

topologyItems.text: Standard wrist band included. Adjustable to fit most wrist sizes. Available in multiple colours. Suitable for daily wear including showering
Lanyard attachment allows the Kallos to be worn around the neck. Ideal for residents who prefer not to wear a wrist band.
The Kallos integrates with the full Rythmos® ecosystem — Access + Wander Readers, Anchor mesh network, Gateway, and Care Manager — for centralized resident monitoring.

specs.label: Indoor Positioning:
specs.value: Rythmos Mesh Network with 3 m accuracy

specs.label: Buttons:
specs.value: Force touch display and Side button

specs.label: Mesh Network Protocol:
specs.value: Rythmos Mesh Network Wirepas 2.4 GHz based

safetyCareFeatures: Integrated nurse call button: For immediate caregiver alerts
GPS-LTE outdoor tracking: For residents outside the community. Minute-by-minute location data
Automatic fall monitoring: Via machine learning algorithms. Detects and sends alerts to staff in real time.
Elopement protection: Via customizable wander management tiers. Works with Rythmos® Access + Wander Readers at exits.
Real-time indoor location: Faster caregiver response. Powered by Rythmos® mesh network anchors.
Centralized alerts: Managed through Rythmos® Care Manager.

installation.title: Standard Wrist Band
installation.content: Adjustable band available in multiple colors; suitable for daily wear and showering.

installation.title: Neck / Lanyard Wear
installation.content: Ideal for residents who prefer not to wear a wrist band

installation.content: Difficult-to-remove design for at-risk residents; includes a magnetic key

installation.content: Internal battery with no replacement required.

installation.title: Zero On-site Servicing
installation.content: All software updates are managed remotely via the portal.

installation.title: Cleaning

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Motion Light Switch
heroDescription: Rythmos® Motion Light Switch is a passive infrared (PIR) motion sensor designed for occupancy and vacancy-based lighting control. Featuring integrated Rythmos Mesh Network connectivity, it delivers reliable motion-triggered load control in a compact wall-switch form factor.
heroIcons: Relays wireless signals across the mesh network

specs.label: Mesh Network Protocol:
specs.value: Rythmos Mesh Network Wirepas 2.4 GHz based

capabilities.name: Hands-Free Operation
capabilities.desc: No need to use manual switches

capabilities.name: Easy Installation
capabilities.desc: Fits standard wall boxes for fast deployment

systemFeatures: On-board antenna: Integrated antenna for seamless mesh network connectivity
LED motion indicator: Local visual feedback for motion detection
Adjustable time delay: Customizable timing for occupancy and vacancy modes.
Button reset: Quick device reset by holding the button for 5 seconds
Wide Compatibility: Works with standard ballast, LED, and incandescent loads
5-year warranty: Long-term reliability with a comprehensive 5-year warranty

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content: Installs in a standard single-gang wall box at a height of up to 4ft

installation.title: Setup
installation.content: Ensure the Fresnel lens remains unobstructed for optimal detection

installation.title: Wiring Guide
installation.content:
• Black Wire: Connect to Hot/Live
• White Wire: Connect to Neutral
• Bare Wire: Connect to Ground
• Red Wire: Connect to Load

installation.title: Reset
installation.content: Hold the button for 5 seconds to reset the device settings

installation.title: Colors
installation.content: Available in White, Ivory, and Light Almond

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Pull Cord
heroDescription: Rythmos® Pull Cord is Battery-powered nurse call device that enables residents to initiate alerts by pull cord or lever, providing immediate caregiver notification.
heroIcons: Triggers alert events via pull cord or lever
Sends alerts through Rythmos® mesh network to caregivers
Provides LED confirmation that alert was sent

specs.label: Installation:
specs.value: Surface mount · Tape · Single gang box

capabilities.name: Easy Install
capabilities.desc: No tools or special wiring needed

featuresBenefits: Simple pull-cord activation: No complex interaction is required for the resident to initiate an alert
Water resistant design: Can be safely placed in high-moisture environments like bathrooms, baths, and spas where falls are common
Real-time alert delivery: Alerts are delivered instantly to care staff via the Rythmos® Care Manager.
LED visual indicator: Reassures the resident by providing visual confirmation that the alert has been sent
Battery powered: No wiring or power outlet required; uses 2 x AA batteries (included) rated for up to 5 years
Customizable alert routing: Can be configured to support non-emergency events, including housekeeping requests and maintenance needs.
deploymentTip: Pull cords should be installed in bathrooms, toilets, and other high-risk areas where immediate assistance may be required. Devices must be positioned within easy reach from both seated and floor levels to ensure accessibility in case of a fall. Placement near beds in resident rooms is also recommended. Installations should avoid obstructions and be validated during setup to ensure alerts are reliably delivered to staff.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Install in bathrooms, bedrooms
- Suitable for high-moisture areas

installation.title: Reachability
installation.content:
- Accessible from seated or floor
- Always within emergency reach

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
- Surface mount (wall or fixture)
- Tape or single gang box

installation.title: Environment
installation.content:
- Wet-area approved
- Suitable for high-risk fall areas

installation.title: Power
installation.content:
- Battery powered (no wiring)
- 2 × AA batteries included

installation.title: Maintenance
installation.content:
- No reconfig. replacement
- Low battery indication

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Access + Wander Reader
heroDescription: Rythmos® Access + Wander Reader is a wired access control and wander management reader designed for staff/resident access.
heroIcons: Controls door access via maglocks and strikes

capabilities.name: Audible Alert
capabilities.desc: Optional onboard buzzer or external sounder

accessFeatures: Universal Compatibility: Works with maglocks and electrified strikes
Proximity Access: Hands-free entry via wearables (1-30 ft range)
Alternate Entry: Supports keypad, push-button, and motion sensor (REX)
High Capacity: Supports up to 900 credentials
Tap to Access: Supports NFC keycards (MIFARE Classic) and fobs
Mobile Entry: Touchless access using mobile devices
Status Feedback: LED indicators (Red / Green / Blue)
deploymentTip: Access + Wander Readers should be installed at exit doors, entry points, and transitions between monitored zones to support effective wander management and access control. Devices must be positioned to ensure reliable detection of wearables within the intended coverage area.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Install at door access points
- Indoor & outdoor (IP67)

installation.title: Door Contact
installation.content:
- Use NC contact for door state
- Connect only to primary reader

installation.title: Multi-Reader
installation.content:
- Use DualIn / DualOut
- Only primary reader controls lock

installation.title: Power
installation.content:
- 12–24V DC (min 1A)
- PSU must support lock load

installation.title: Access Inputs
installation.content:
- Keypad, button, or motion sensor
- Must use NO dry contact

installation.title: Environment
installation.content:
- IP67 rated
- Use enclosure if exposed

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Sleep Mat
heroDescription: Rythmos® Sleep Mat is an under-mattress sensor that continuously collects sleep and health data, enabling caregivers to monitor resident wellbeing and detect changes in nighttime behavior.
systemFeatures: Automatically syncs data to Rythmos® platform
Enables long-term trend analysis and care planning
Supports early detection of health changes
Provides actionable insights for caregivers
Integrates with care workflows and alerts
Automatically starts tracking when resident lies down
Stores data during network interruptions
Designed for single-resident tracking
Works independently of wearables
Enables baseline behavior profiling
deploymentTip: The sensor should be installed under the mattress in the primary sleeping area, ensuring full and consistent contact with the mattress surface for accurate data capture. Monitoring should focus on trends over time rather than isolated events to provide meaningful insights into user patterns.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Install under mattress
- Position at chest level

installation.title: Compatibility
installation.content:
- Works with 4–15 in thickness
- Suitable for standard beds

installation.title: Power
installation.content:
- Requires 5V / 1A USB power
- Continuous power required

installation.title: Connectivity
installation.content:
- Connect via Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz)
- Bluetooth used for setup

installation.title: Cleaning
installation.content:
- Removable cover is machine washable
- Ensure cover is fully dry before use

installation.title: Care
installation.content:
- Do not use liquids on sensor
- Keep sensor protected inside

installation.title: Handling
installation.content:
- Do not bend, fold, or apply pressure
- Avoid removing cover unnecessarily

installation.title: Service
installation.content:
- Do not attempt to repair or open
- Contact support for hardware issues

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Door & Window Sensor
heroDescription: Rythmos® Door & Window Sensor is a wireless magnetic contact sensor that monitors the open and closed status of doors, windows, and other access points, supporting wander management and facility security.
systemSecurityFeatures: Monitors restricted areas and exit points
Supports cabinet and internal access monitoring
technicalCapabilities: Event-driven architecture: Triggers on state change (open/close/propped)
Low-power optimization: Dynamic reporting reduces battery usage
Remote configuration: Adjustable reporting intervals and thresholds
deploymentTip: Install the sensor on all exit doors and other high-risk areas to ensure effective monitoring of movement and access. It can also be used for cabinets, restricted zones, and internal doors where additional control is required. Alert timing should be configured based on resident schedules to align with daily routines and reduce unnecessary notifications.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Install sensor on frame, magnet on moving surface
- Ensure proper alignment for accurate detection

installation.title: Environment
installation.content:
- Indoor use recommended
- Avoid strong magnetic interference

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
- Use adhesive for quick install
- Use screws for permanent mounting

installation.title: Power
installation.content:
- 2 × AAA batteries
- Replaceable, no reconfiguration required

installation.title: Alignment
installation.content:
- Maintain correct gap between sensor and magnet
- Ensure consistent positioning when closed

installation.title: Conditions
installation.content:
- Op. temp: −20°C to +50°C
- Humidity: 0–100% RH (non-condensing)

installation.title: Constraints
installation.content:
- Avoid proximity to RF sources
- Avoid direct sunlight and heating devices

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Liquid Detection Sensor
heroDescription: Rythmos® Liquid Detection Sensor is a wireless device designed to detect liquid presence in indoor environments, supporting both leak detection and incontinence monitoring in resident spaces.

capabilities.name: Extended Coverage
capabilities.desc: Optional detection rope for larger areas

systemFeatures: Real-time leak alerts: Immediate notification when liquid reaches detection pins
Continuous condition monitoring: Hourly status updates even without active events
Scalable area coverage: Supports rope extension for large or complex spaces
Event-based intelligence: Triggers only on actual change, reducing noise and false alerts
Surface-level detection precision: Detects liquid exactly where it accumulates first
Installation validation: Detects incorrect setup or missing detection components
deploymentTip: Liquid detection sensors should be installed in areas where leaks or spills are most likely to occur, such as under sinks, near toilets, around water heaters, and along pipes or appliances.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Install directly on floor or surface where liquid collects first
- Position detection pins downward

installation.title: Detection Setup
installation.content:
- Place in areas where liquid is likely to accumulate
- Ensure liquid can reach sensor location

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
- Use adhesive base for quick install
- Ensure clean, non-conductive surface

installation.title: Extended Coverage
installation.content:
- Use detection rope for large areas or equipment
- Route along pipes, edges, or surfaces

installation.title: Environment
installation.content:
- Suitable for indoor and harsh environments (IP67)
- Avoid oils, chemicals, and corrosive liquids

installation.title: Power
installation.content:
- Internal battery (non-replaceable)
- No wiring required

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Smoke Alarm
heroDescription: Rythmos® Smoke Alarm is a battery-powered optical smoke detector designed to identify smoldering fires and provide early warning through audible alerts and system notifications.
operationMaintenance: Indicates recent alarms via LED memory
Requires weekly manual testing (Test / Hush button)
Allows temporary silencing (~10 min hush mode)
deploymentTip: Install the device in hallways, bedrooms, and common areas to ensure comprehensive coverage across the facility. Placement should prioritize escape routes to support early detection in critical pathways. For full-area protection, multiple interconnected units should be used to provide consistent and reliable coverage throughout the space.

installation.title: Coverage
installation.content:
- Install on every floor
- Place near sleeping areas and escape paths

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Ceiling mounted (center of room)
- Minimum 300 mm from walls

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
- Twist-on base installation
- Screw-mounted plate included

installation.title: Power
installation.content:
- Sealed battery (no replacement)
- Activated on installation

installation.title: Avoid
installation.content:
- Kitchens, bathrooms, high steam areas
- Air vents, direct sunlight, dust

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Wireless Door Lock
heroDescription: Rythmos® Wireless Door Lock is a smart access control solution designed for seamless and secure entry in resident and staff environments. It enables keyless access using wearables, mobile devices, and NFC credentials.
systemSafetyFeatures: Real-time access events: Tracks all entry activity across the system in real time
Configurable access control: Customize permissions, schedules, and access levels
Integration with workflows: Supports staff, resident, and operational access processes
Centralized management: All locks managed via Rythmos® Care Manager platform
Audit & activity tracking: Maintains detailed logs for security and compliance needs
Secure wireless operation: Encrypted BLE communication ensures safe access control
deploymentTip: Secure, touch-free door access using wearables, NFC, or mobile credentials. LED and buzzer feedback confirm lock status, while configurable unlock timing, proximity range, and operating modes support flexible access control across resident rooms, med rooms, and staff areas.

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Secure Locking Band
heroDescription: Rythmos® Secure Locking Band is a safety accessory designed to ensure continuous wearable usage for at-risk residents. It prevents easy removal while maintaining comfort and usability in daily care environments.

capabilities.name: Waterproof Design
capabilities.desc: Safe for shower and daily hygiene routines

systemSafetyFeatures: Continuous device compliance: Ensures residents remain connected to monitoring systems
Supports high-risk residents: Ideal for wander risk and fall monitoring scenarios
Reduces device loss: Prevents removal or misplacement of wearables
Caregiver-controlled access: Only staff can remove device when required

installation.title: Setup
installation.content:
- Attach band securely to wearable
- Adjust size for proper wrist fit

installation.title: Locking
installation.content:
- Engage locking mechanism fully
- Verify secure closure

installation.title: Removal
installation.content:
- Use magnetic unlocking tool only
- Keep tool accessible to staff

installation.title: Cleaning
installation.content:
- Waterproof — suitable for regular washing
- Wipe or rinse as needed

installation.title: Care
installation.content:
- Check band integrity regularly
- Ensure locking mechanism functions properly

installation.title: Usage
installation.content:
- Avoid excessive force or bending
- Store unlocking tool safely

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Door Bell
heroDescription: Rythmos® Door Bell is a wireless visitor notification solution built on the Rythmos® wearable platform. It uses a mounted push-button to alert staff when someone is at a secured entrance or door.

capabilities.name: Visitor Notification
capabilities.desc: Staff alerting when someone is ringing

capabilities.name: Simple Interaction
capabilities.desc: Single button press to trigger alert

capabilities.name: Location Awareness
capabilities.desc: Identifies specific door or entry point

systemSafetyFeatures: Real-time alert delivery: Immediate notification to staff devices
Entry workflow support: Helps manage controlled access points
Centralized visibility: All alerts tracked in Rythmos® Care Manager platform
Event logging: Maintains history of visitor activity
Scalable deployment: Supports multiple doors and entry points
Reliable system integration: Supports multiple doors and entry points
deploymentTip: Button press triggers an alert that is transmitted through the Rythmos® mesh network to the Care Manager, notifying staff of a visitor at the door.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Install near doors or secured entries
- Position within easy reach

installation.title: Environment
installation.content:
- Indoor use recommended
- Avoid direct exposure to moisture

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
- Mount enclosure to wall or surface
- Ensure stable and secure placement

installation.title: Battery
installation.content:
- Replace batteries as needed
- Monitor battery status via platform

installation.title: Cleaning
installation.content:
- Wipe with dry cloth
- Avoid liquids entering device

installation.title: Care
installation.content:
- Ensure button responsiveness
- Check LED functionality

title: Rythmos®
subtitle: Asset Tags
heroDescription: Rythmos® Asset Tags are compact wireless tracking devices designed to monitor the location and movement of mobile equipment across a facility. They provide real-time visibility of critical assets such as wheelchairs, med carts, lifts, and medical devices.

capabilities.name: Real-Time Tracking
capabilities.desc: Tracks mobile assets in the community

capabilities.name: Flexible Mounting
capabilities.desc: Supports adhesive, screw, or bracket install

capabilities.name: Waterproof Construction
capabilities.desc: IP67-rated for medical and facility areas

systemSafetyFeatures: Centralized asset visibility: Locate equipment through Care Manager platform
Workflow optimization: Reduces time spent searching for devices
Real-time status updates: Continuous reporting through mesh network
Wireless communication: Encrypted mesh networking for reliable operation
Facility-wide coverage: Supports dense indoor tracking deployments
Medical environment ready: Designed for hospitals, care communities, and clinics
deploymentTip: Ideal for tracking high-value and frequently moved equipment such as wheelchairs, med carts, lifts, and medical devices across hospitals, senior living communities, and clinical care environments. Deploy throughout the facility to improve asset visibility, reduce search time, and support operational efficiency.

installation.title: Placement
installation.content:
- Mount directly on tracked equipment
- Ensure secure attachment to surface

installation.title: Power
installation.content: - CR3032 replaceable coin cell battery

installation.title: Mounting
installation.content:
- Use adhesive, screws, or mounting bracket
- Optional colored plugs available for identification

installation.title: Environment
installation.content:
- Indoor and wet-cleaning environments supported
- IP67-rated for dust and water protection

installation.title: Maintenance
installation.content:
- Replace CR3032 battery as needed
- Inspect mounting stability periodically

installation.title: Cleaning
installation.content:
- Can be wiped or washed down safely
- OTA updates supported
